data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of attribution to source campaign and conversion outcome, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete checks or confirmations regarding the tracking of conversions to the source campaign. This leads to a clear gap in requirement coverage, as the necessary information to assess the requirement is lacking.
gaps: No evidence of attribution to source campaign and conversion outcome.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
